hero.name: Julia Pilch
hero.title: Physiotherapist
hero.tagline: Physiotherapy grounded in movement, function, and an individual approach.

availability.text: Currently seeking a clinic position in Trondheim — and learning Norwegian (A1) for the long term.

about.heading: A versatile physiotherapist who treats the person, not just the diagnosis.
paragraphs: I work across the full musculoskeletal and rehabilitation spectrum — orthopaedic recovery, sports injuries, post-operative care and therapeutic exercise — always shaped around the individual in front of me. Alongside that broad practice, I've developed a focused expertise in rehabilitation after amputation and limb loss.
I'm now looking for a physiotherapy role in a clinic in Trondheim, where I can bring careful, hands-on care to a wide range of patients.
about.imageAlt: Julia Pilch working with a patient

expertise.heading: Broad clinical care, with one standout specialism.

howIWork.paragraph: Every plan starts with assessment and listening — then combines hands-on treatment with progressive, achievable exercise that fits each person's goals and pace.

references.heading: What colleagues and supervisors say.
references.subheading: Professional endorsements from people I've worked alongside.
